title: Oil prices ease but are set for 10% weekly gain as Trump mulls 'bigger than ever' attack on Iran
summary_full: Oil prices dropped by around 3% on Friday, but remained on track for a weekly jump of 10% as the U.S.-Iran war continued to escalate.
summary_public: Oil prices dropped by around 3% on Friday, but remained on track for a weekly jump of 10% as the U.S.-Iran war continued to escalate.
